description: State of the SRX cluster and the compute nodes underneath

panels.description: Basic system info

targets.expr: (max by (hostname, model, os_version, target) (junos_system_hardware_info{target="${device}"}) * 0) + on (target) group_left junos_system_license_installed{target="${device}", feature_name="vcpu scale"}

panels.description: How many SRX nodes are running
panels.title: SRX nodes up

panels.description: How long each SRX node has been running since the last reboot
panels.title: SRX uptime

panels.description: Number of warning-type alerts from Junos OS
panels.title: SRX yellow alarms

panels.description: Number of high-importance alerts from Junos OS
panels.title: SRX red alarms

panels.description: 1, 5 and 15-minute load averages of Routing Engine system of SRX nodes
panels.title: SRX RE load averages

panels.description: List of alerts reported by Junos OS
panels.title: SRX system alarm details

panels.description: Statuses reported by Junos OS for each controlplane redundancy group node instance
panels.title: SRX Controlplane HA

panels.description: Statuses reported by Junos OS for each Routing Engine instance
panels.title: Routing Engines status

panels.description: CPU time used by type and node
panels.title: CPU time %

panels.description: Memory used by control/data planes of Routing Engine as a percentage of total, per node
panels.title: Memory usage %

panels.description: Number of active routes for each defined routing table
panels.title: Active routes in tables

panels.description: How long it took for every individual Junos OS exporter scrape to complete
panels.title: Scrape timings

panels.description: Rate of outgoing connections through SRX firewall, grouped by source/destination and the applied traffic policy. Does not include internet policies.
panels.title: Connection rate by policy (internal networks)

panels.description: Rate of outgoing internet connections through SRX firewall

targets.expr: max by (policy_name, from_zone, to_zone) (irate(junos_security_policies_hit_count{target="${device}", from_zone!~".*LOOPBACK", to_zone!~".*LOOPBACK", policy_name="INTERNET"}[5m]))

panels.title: Internet policy connection rate

panels.description: Packets per second across all interface queues, by action taken
panels.title: Interface queues packet rate

panels.description: Bytes per second across all interface queues, by action taken
panels.title: Interface queues data rate

panels.description: Interface receive/transmit packets per second, only shown for interfaces with any traffic during the chosen period
panels.title: Rx/Tx packet rate

panels.description: Interface receive/transmit bytes per second, only shown for interfaces with any traffic during the chosen period
panels.title: Rx/Tx data rate

panels.description: Interface receive/transmit errors per second, only shown for interfaces with errors during the chosen period
panels.title: Rx/Tx error rate

panels.description: Interface receive/transmit drops per second, only shown for interfaces with drops during the chosen period
panels.title: Rx/Tx drop rate

panels.description: Rates of interface frames that are not normal, only shown for interfaces with abnormal frames during the chosen period, grouped by interface and the frame type
panels.title: Rx abnormal frame rate

panels.description: Detailed interface speed, MTU, error and state information
panels.title: Interface details

panels.description: How many BGP sessions are up and running
panels.title: BGP sessions up

panels.description: How many BGP prefixes are being advertised in total (non-unique, to all peers)
panels.title: BGP prefixes advertised

panels.description: How many BGP prefixes have been received in total (non-unique, from all peers)
panels.title: BGP prefixes received

panels.description: How many BGP-announced routes are active
panels.title: BGP routes active

panels.description: Detailed information about configured BGP sessions
panels.title: BGP sessions

title: SRX Firewall
